name: playhub-veo-sync
description: Lambda for Veo Clubhouse scraping (cache-sync) and cleanup

scripts.package: npm run build && rm -rf dist/node_modules && mkdir -p dist/node_modules && cp -r node_modules/playwright-core dist/node_modules/ && rm -f dist.zip && cd dist && zip -r ../dist.zip .
scripts.package:layer: rm -rf chromium-layer && mkdir -p chromium-layer/nodejs/node_modules && cp -r node_modules/@sparticuz node_modules/follow-redirects node_modules/tar-fs node_modules/streamx node_modules/bare-events node_modules/b4a node_modules/fast-fifo node_modules/text-decoder chromium-layer/nodejs/node_modules/ && rm -f chromium-layer.zip && cd chromium-layer && zip -r ../chromium-layer.zip .
scripts.deploy: npm run package && npm run package:layer && cd ../../terraform && terraform apply -target=aws_lambda_layer_version.chromium -target=aws_lambda_function.veo_sync
